subject: Extract feature engineering logic from Step 4 scripts
description: Read pre_csd_4_engineer_features.py and each category's Step 4 script. Identify: (a) What features are created (lags, rolling stats, trend, seasonal indicators). (b) Whether log transform is applied to sales_units. (c) How promotional effects are encoded. (d) Whether weighted_dist is used for weighting. Output: feature_engineering_audit.md with actual features list + code snippets.
